creator: promptfoo

evidence.text: LLM providers require an API key. Set yours as an environment variable: ```sh export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-abc123 ``` Once you're in the example directory, run an eval and view results: ```sh cd getting-started promptfoo eval promptfoo view ``` See [Getting Started](https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/getting-started/) (evals) or [Red Teaming](https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/red-team/) (vulnerability scanning) for more. ## What can you do with Promptfoo? - **Test your prompts and models** with [automated evaluations](https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/getting-started/) - **Secure your LLM apps** with [red teaming](https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/red-team/) and vulnerability scanning -
